spec_match.rationale: Interactive walk-through now checks HTTPS schemes, same-site boundaries, destination id, old app id, migrate_from, allow_migration, behavior, install_url, and server reachability.

interactive.rationale: Very robust interactive environment allowing the user to supply customized mock inputs and trigger verification checklist passes.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the updated parent description of Chrome 150 migration checks.

edge_cases.rationale: Escapes all user-controlled fields before rendering checklist code and generated status, and includes same-site and redirect/install_url edge cases.

references.rationale: Includes the mandatory ChromeStatus reference link on the concept page.

design_system.rationale: Uses sleek forms, bold checklist indicators, custom input border highlights, and dark code banners.

summary: Re-reviewed after replacing the obsolete migration checks with the current Chrome 150 migrate_from / allow_migration verification model. The checker keeps escaped DOM output and adds generated destination manifest, old-origin association, and optional migrate_to JSON.
